lines.speaker: Asteros Arceuus
lines.text: You've done a great service to the people of Arceuus. Thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Asteros. What brings you to the castle?

lines.speaker: Asteros Arceuus
lines.text: The King's late father asked for an advisor from Arceuus. He was keen for us to have a more central role than we did under the Council.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. I'm sure the King is glad to have you here.

lines.speaker: Asteros Arceuus
lines.text: He does seem willing to take on my advice, which is very welcoming. I hope he remains humble. It is a trait many leaders lack.

lines.speaker: Asteros Arceuus
lines.text: Now, is there something else I can do for you? If you're interested, I can offer you the ability to respawn at Kourend Castle upon death.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Asteros Arceuus
lines.text: Very well. From now on, you will respawn at Kourend Castle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Asteros Arceuus
lines.text: Let me know if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Asteros.

lines.speaker: Asteros Arceuus
lines.text: Hello there. Would you like me to change your respawn point to Kourend Castle?

lines.speaker: Asteros Arceuus
lines.text: Hello there. Would you like me to revert your respawn point to Lumbridge?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Asteros Arceuus
lines.text: Very well. From now on, you will respawn at Kourend Castle.

lines.speaker: Asteros Arceuus
lines.text: Very well. From now on, you will respawn in Lumbridge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What brings you to the castle?

lines.speaker: Asteros Arceuus

lines.speaker: Asteros Arceuus

lines.speaker: Asteros Arceuus
lines.text: Now, is there something else I can do for you? If you're interested, I can change your respawn point to Kourend Castle.

lines.speaker: Asteros Arceuus
lines.text: Now, is there something else I can do for you? If you want, I can revert your respawn point to Lumbridge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.
